title: Produce a plan, then implement
prompt: Implement isPalindrome(s) in pal.js (case-insensitive, ignore non-alphanumerics). First state a short plan, then implement, then verify.

checks.value: node -e "import('./pal.js').then(m=>{if(!m.isPalindrome('A man, a plan, a canal: Panama')||m.isPalindrome('abc'))process.exit(1)})"
checks.label: palindrome logic correct
